name: Kera Jenkins Corn Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Equal parts corn liquid (see note) and water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together.
2. Pour the batter onto a greased, heated griddle.
- Note: For corn liquid, use water in which corn has been boiled, sweetened to taste with corn syrup; or use liquid from canned corn.
Source: San Diego Union Tribune, Nov 3, 1994.
